_disclaimer: All ratings are draft community/editorial recommendations, not final market truth. Recheck official patch notes before trusting any recommendation.

strategies.name: Expedition / Whispers (Logbooks)
strategies.confidence: Medium/High for mechanics; Medium for profit
best_mods: Forgotten By Time (if build can handle it)
strategies.atlas_choices: Expedition Atlas Tree; Doryani Refined Formula for controlled explosives; Hilda Scarred Lands for density; Jado Eastern Knowledge for Verisium Remnants
strategies.budget_setup: Expedition tablets with of Knowledge / of Runes; safe rare Waystones
strategies.high_investment_setup: Forgotten By Time plus high-mod Waystones, 8+ good Remnants, Liquid Verisium rerolling
strategies.rewards: Logbooks, artifacts, rune recipes, Liquid Verisium value, Grand Expedition rewards
warnings: Owner update 2026-07-05: Expeditions are no longer tablets. Use the Expedition Whispers tab; old tablet modifiers are legacy.

strategies.name: Ritual
strategies.atlas_choices: Ritual Atlas tree; Doryani safety if no better Master (no direct Ritual Master node verified in Phase 2)
strategies.budget_setup: Ritual tablets with Omen chance or tribute gain
strategies.high_investment_setup: Freedom of Faith with reroll mods and strong tribute generation
avoid: Freedom of Faith without tribute support
strategies.rewards: Omens, unique rewards, high-value Ritual favours
warnings: Reroll/Defer cost modifier wording is CONFLICTED (increased vs reduced Tribute) — excluded from trade search until verified.

strategies.name: Breach
strategies.atlas_choices: Breach Atlas nodes; Jado for strongbox/unique route; Doryani magic-monster setups may help density
strategies.high_investment_setup: Stack Breach tablets with quantity/density and strong clear speed
avoid: of the Hand if rewards do not justify danger

strategies.name: Delirium
strategies.atlas_choices: Delirium Atlas nodes; Delirium + Ritual overlap is promising but needs current testing
strategies.high_investment_setup: Simulacrum suffix stack plus Ritual overlap
strategies.rewards: Simulacrum splinters, Delirium rewards, dense loot
warnings: Several fog modifiers have wording/sign CONFLICTS — excluded from trade search until verified.

strategies.name: Abyss
strategies.atlas_choices: Abyss Atlas nodes; 0.5.4 fixed Atlas passives applying in Abyssal Depths
strategies.high_investment_setup: Unforeseen Consequences plus high-density tablets if performance/build allows
strategies.rewards: Desecrated currency, jewels, Abyssal Depths, Kulemak-related drops

strategies.name: Boss / Overseer
strategies.confidence: Medium/High for node text; Medium for profit
strategies.atlas_choices: Hilda Mighty Prey / Patient Battue / Gutting and Skinning; Jado In The Wrong Hands; Doryani Head of the Snake
strategies.budget_setup: Overseer tablets with of Pathways or safe reward mods
strategies.high_investment_setup: Hilda/Jado/Doryani boss setups with unique/boss reward scaling
strategies.rewards: Boss uniques, waystones, lineage/exceptional item paths

strategies.name: General Currency Mapping
strategies.atlas_choices: Doryani Improved Calibration / Stitch the Flesh; tablet-effect passives
strategies.budget_setup: Alch-and-go with decent tablets and safe Waystone
strategies.rewards: Raw currency, bases, waystones, side content

strategies.name: Waystone Sustain
strategies.atlas_choices: Main Atlas sustain passives; Doryani safety/calibration
strategies.high_investment_setup: Combine Cartographer x3 with Overseer of Pathways and boss density
warnings: Waystone modifier pool is now a verified draft from PoE2DB + trade metadata; use the optimizer as a rule-of-thumb planner, not a profit simulator.

strategies.name: Temple / Vaal Beacon (Experimental)
strategies.high_investment_setup: Not recommended until Temple data complete
avoid: Treating this as a proven strategy
warnings: Temple suffix roll ranges are now sourced from PoE2DB/trade metadata, but the farming strategy remains experimental and needs economy testing.
